# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading SimpleImageResizer WPF application from `net8.0-windows7.0` to `net10.0-windows` using the All-at-Once strategy. Work is split into concern-based tasks covering prerequisites, framework/package updates, configuration migration, API modernization, and final validation.

**Progress**: 0/5 tasks complete (0%) ![0%](https://progress-bar.xyz/0)

## Tasks

- 🔄 01-prerequisites: Validate .NET 10 SDK and environment
- 🔲 02-framework-and-packages: Update target framework and NuGet packages
- 🔲 03-legacy-config-migration: Migrate legacy configuration system
- 🔲 04-api-modernization: Fix source-incompatible APIs and behavioral changes
- 🔲 05-validation: Build and test validation
